projectDescription: API Gateway for the Atotonilco de Tula municipal heritage asset management system, handling authentication, routing, and communication between microservices.
keyFeatures: Centralized routing to multiple microservices (auth, bienes, upload, importador)
Intelligent service wake-up for Render.com cold-start handling
Transparent authentication header forwarding via Bearer tokens
Automatic proxy error recovery with retry logic for non-GET requests
CORS support with credentials for cross-origin frontend access
Module-based request tagging via x-module header
Path rewriting to normalize upstream service URLs
Health check endpoint for gateway availability monitoring
